meaning: adj.箱子般四四方方的,矮胖的
examples: The second story of a nearby house perches on a single pillar, like a boxy flamingo.
The second storey of a nearby house perches on a single pillar, like a boxy flamingo.
Most page elements have a boxy contour, so this variation will create some unique contrast.
The funny-looking vehicles come as a four-door hatchback (the xA) or a boxy van (the xB).
Stratasys makes boxy machines that turn digital drawings into life-size prototype parts within a few hours.
